description: Choropleth map displaying the spatial coverage of European Ground Motion Service (EGMS) products across Europe. The base map is satellite imagery showing landmasses and oceans. Country borders are outlined in yellow, encompassing a wide range of nations including EU Member States, Iceland, Ireland, United Kingdom, Portugal, Spain, France, Belgium, Netherlands, Germany, Denmark, Norway, Sweden, Finland, Poland, Czech Republic, Austria, Switzerland, Italy, Croatia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Serbia, Romania, Bulgaria, Greece, and parts of Turkey. A regular grid pattern, depicted by thin green lines, is superimposed over the terrestrial areas and extends into coastal waters, particularly around the British Isles, Scandinavian coastlines, and the Mediterranean Sea. These green grid cells represent the product delivery units, consistent with the 50000 m easting and northing multiples in ETRS89-LAEA as described in the accompanying text for EGMS products.
